note: ADR-010 Layer 2 fallback bank for Lesson 2 (composition). Hand-curated items used when the agent fails twice in a row, so the L2 lesson never stalls. Every claimedTruthTable is hand-verified and asserted against @polymath/booleans in fallbackBank.test.ts. XOR is the pedagogical label only — the parser knows NOT/AND/OR, so XOR ships as the composition (A AND NOT B) OR (NOT A AND B). Tiers mirror L1: 1 = single composition, 2 = nested, 3 = XOR-as-composition / three-var.

items.targetExpression: (A AND NOT B) OR (NOT A AND B)
(A AND B) OR (B AND C) OR (A AND C)
